one_time_description: Incremental Treaty Agreement funding of $2,749,000 received for purchase of three properties in Chemainus, BC; remaining funds held in trust to be returned to Province of BC
economic_notes: Halalt Logging Contracting LP (99.9% interest) for truck log hauling on reserve; 1241478 BC Ltd (100% owned) holds land and buildings including three Chemainus properties; Hul'q'umi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership (20% interest); BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP; shellfish sales revenue reported
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Province is BC. Consolidated entities include Halalt First Nation Government Administration, Halalt First Nation Trusts Fund, and CMHC Housing Program. Government business enterprise HLC General Partner Ltd (0.1% of Halalt Logging Contracting LP) accounted for by modified equity method. 1241478 BC Ltd (100% owned) holds title to land and buildings. $406,577 adjustment to accumulated surplus represents prior year proportionate share from Halalt Logging Contracting LP investment. Deferred revenue of $1,669,558 in 2020 related to Ministry of Indigenous Relations and Reconciliation treaty agreement funds was fully drawn down in 2021. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $6,929,719 + CMHC $14,356 + DFO $87,770 + Federal Other $153,848 + Provincial $2,025,539 = $9,211,232; OSR = $10,713,991 - $9,211,232 = $1,502,759. No schedule of remuneration provided. Contingent liability of $532,958 for on-reserve housing loan guarantees.
